context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the multi-priority currency detection chain, persists currency preferences with the right cookie settings, handles Stripe amount calculation for zero-decimal currencies, uses Stripe presentment currency, and follows the recommended approach for database storage of prices.

checklist.name: Cookie checked first
checklist.description: Currency detection checks for a 'preferred_currency' cookie as the highest-priority signal before any other source

checklist.name: Accept-Language second
checklist.description: Currency detection falls through to the Accept-Language header as the second-priority source when no cookie is set

checklist.name: CF/CDN header third
checklist.description: Currency detection falls through to cf-ipcountry or x-country header as the third-priority source

checklist.name: Default to base currency
checklist.description: Currency detection defaults to the base currency (USD) when no other signal is available

checklist.name: Cookie name correct
checklist.description: The preference cookie is set with the name 'preferred_currency' (not a different name)

checklist.name: Cookie maxAge one year
checklist.description: The preference cookie is set with maxAge of 365 days (31536000000 ms or equivalent)

checklist.name: Cookie httpOnly true
checklist.description: The preference cookie is set with httpOnly: true

checklist.name: Cookie sameSite lax
checklist.description: The preference cookie is set with sameSite: 'lax'

checklist.name: Stripe amount multiply by 100
checklist.description: createPaymentIntent multiplies the display price by 100 (and uses Math.round) for standard currencies in the Stripe amount field

checklist.name: JPY not multiplied
checklist.description: createPaymentIntent does NOT multiply by 100 for JPY (zero-decimal currency) — passes the whole number amount to Stripe

checklist.name: Currency lowercased for Stripe
checklist.description: The currency field passed to Stripe is lowercased (e.g. 'eur', 'jpy') not uppercase

checklist.name: Base price in metadata
checklist.description: The Stripe paymentIntents.create parameters include metadata with the base_currency_amount (USD price) for reconciliation

checklist.name: Store base currency in DB
checklist.description: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md or code comments state that prices are stored in the base currency (USD) in the database, not in the display currency
